channel.title: Create Ubuntu VMs :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: If you get the error No route to host with any of the following steps, use the Troubleshoot Ansible steps Create Ubuntu VM’s from Terminal in OOB ​ RDP to OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/ubuntu ​ RDP to OOB ./create_ubuntu_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_sdwan ​ RDP to OOB ./start_stop_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_sdwan started Finish Configuring Ubuntu VM’s Make sure Ubuntu-x VMs have fully started (i.e. GUI is up and running) before exeucting the following. Suggest opening console windows on PVE to verify. ​ Continuing from Terminal in OOB ./wallpaper_update.sh ubuntu_sdwan
